_comment: SVA/SVU/UVA/UVU/ORV families have a different position layout than standard valves. The 16-character backbone is the same but Pos 4-5 encodes the set pressure (Einstelldruck) instead of connection type, and Pos 12 encodes connection variants instead of handwheel/cap. Source: Example part number definition AWP.pdf, page 18.3 (safety valves SVA SVU / overflow valves UVA UVU / oil pressure control valves ORV).

pos45_setPressure._doc: Set pressure code at Pos 4-5. Most codes are interpreted directly as bar value (e.g. 28 = 28 bar set pressure). Special codes may exist; the decoder prints the numeric reading and notes 'set pressure'.

pos12_connectionVariants._doc: Connection variant code at Pos 12 for safety valves.

pos1316_inletOutletAccessories._doc: Pos 13-16 split for safety valves: Pos 13 = inlet (Eingang), Pos 14 = outlet (Ausgang), Pos 15 = inlet fittings (Eingang Zubehör), Pos 16 = outlet fittings (Ausgang Zubehör).

1.labelEn: with inlet fittings (cap nut + weld tail)
with outlet fittings (cap nut + weld tail)
